visual_description: Two men are sitting in the front seats of a car at night. The man on the left is driving and turns his head to look at the man on the right, who is looking forward. The interior of the car is dark, with only the dashboard and faint city lights visible through the windshield.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, asking a question in a calm, conversational tone. The audio is clear and the speech is easily understandable.
